task_objective: Expose game_install_finder as a direct CLI command instead of requiring python -m.
design_decisions: Used a standard pyproject.toml console script entry point instead of a custom repository shell script.
Kept the entry point wired to the existing game_install_finder.cli:main function.
Updated README examples to use ./run.sh uv run game-install-finder so users do not need python -m.
results: Red protocol test failed because pyproject.toml did not define project.scripts.
Added the game-install-finder console script entry point.
After the entrypoint update, ./run.sh uv run ruff check . --fix passed.
After the entrypoint update, ./run.sh uv run ruff format . passed.
After the entrypoint update, ./run.sh uv run ty check src/ passed.
After the entrypoint update, ./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 10 tests.
